title: Team Topologies
description: Architect team boundaries in an organization based on principles of "Cognitive Load" and "Stream-Aligned" patterns. Minimize high-bandwidth coordination requirements across teams through effective application of Team Topologies.
objectives: Architect team boundaries in an organization based on principles of "Cognitive Load" and "Stream-Aligned" patterns.
Minimize high-bandwidth coordination requirements across teams through effective application of Team Topologies.
